allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d['sessions'][0]; print\(f\\"status={s['status']} updatedAt={s['updatedAt']}\\"\)")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001,5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "killed pid=$_" }')

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; "Killed PID $proc" } else { "Nothing on 3001" })

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; "Killed PID $proc" } else { "Nothing on 5173" })

PowerShell(npx tsx -e "import\('./server/agents/prompts.ts'\).then\(m => { const b = m.buildSystemBlocks\(\); console.log\('OK methodology loaded, blocks:', b.length, 'methodology chars:', b[1].text.length\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('FAIL:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell($r = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 5432 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "Postgres on 5432 reachable: $\($r.TcpTestSucceeded\)")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3001/api/health' -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "HEALTH: $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Content\)" } catch { "API not responding on 3001: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(foreach \($p in @\('/health','/api/health','/'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001$p" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "$p -> $\($r.StatusCode\): $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(80,$r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { "$p -> ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
PowerShell($env:PORT='3011'; npx concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npx vite" "npx tsx server/index.ts")

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Select-Object ProcessId, @{n='Cmd';e={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(90,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap; "--- ports ---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3001,5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess)
Bash(git --no-pager diff HEAD -- server/index.ts server/env.ts server/db/client.ts)

PowerShell(foreach \($p in 3001,5173,5174\) { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed PID $_ on port $p" } catch {} } }; "ports cleared")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3001,5173,5174 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [pscustomobject]@{ Port=$_.LocalPort; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Name=$p.Name; Started=$p.StartTime } } | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 57252,52696,30156 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $still = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3001,5173,5174 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { "STILL IN USE: " + \($still.LocalPort -join ','\) } else { "ports 3001/5173/5174 are now free" })
